title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Gateway Distriparks

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Gateway Distriparks
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Fleet Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
